description: Fetch a URL and produce a structured summary of its content, writing findings to disk for downstream modules
usage: fetch this url, summarize this page, pull this link, read this article, what does this page say, grab this url, scrape this page, fetch and summarize

url.description: The URL to fetch and summarize

focus.description: What to focus on in the summary (e.g., 'pricing', 'technical details', 'main argument'). If omitted, produces a general summary.

depth.description: 'summary' for a concise overview (~3-5 key points), 'detailed' for thorough extraction with evidence
